name: torbox
title: TorBox Debrid
author: thorn11166
description: Route magnet links through TorBox. Magnets are cached in the cloud and downloaded as fast direct HTTP.

settings.name: zipDownload
settings.title: Download as ZIP
settings.description: Bundle all files into a single ZIP archive instead of downloading them individually.

settings.name: asQueued
settings.title: Add as Queued
settings.description: Add the torrent to TorBox without immediately using a download slot. Useful if you are on a limited plan.

settings.name: useRedirect
settings.title: Use Permanent URLs
settings.description: Build permanent redirect URLs (faster, no extra API call per file). Disable if you experience download failures.
